context.projectOverview: Sprint 2 of Claude Opus 4.8 Support. Upgrade @anthropic-ai/sdk from 0.39.0 to 0.100.1 (latest) so the new API fields are typed, and fix any breaking changes in the Anthropic adapter while preserving ALL current behavior (especially the prompt-caching helpers added on this branch). NO new feature behavior in this sprint — effort and mid_conv_system are sprints 3 and 4.

completedSprints.title: Repoint opus shorthand to claude-opus-4-8
completedSprints.summary: model-resolver only; opus->claude-opus-4-8 + opus-4-7 pin. No adapter/SDK change.

relevantFiles: src/providers/anthropic.ts — ONLY file importing @anthropic-ai/sdk; contains messages.create, content-block normalization, usage mapping, stop_reason mapping, and the prompt-caching helpers (buildCachedSystem, attachMessageBreakpoints) added on this branch
src/providers/anthropic.test.ts — top-level vi.mock('@anthropic-ai/sdk') tests that must keep passing

verifiedTypesPresentInTarget: MidConversationSystemBlockParam with type: 'mid_conv_system' (member of the ContentBlockParam union)
CacheControlEphemeral, TextBlockParam, ThinkingConfigAdaptive, StopReason still exported
confirmedSdkFacts.note: This sprint does NOT use output_config or mid_conv_system yet (sprints 3/4 do). Their presence is verified here only to satisfy contract C1/C2 and confirm the upgrade target is correct. This sprint's job is the bump + making the existing adapter compile and keep its tests green against 0.100.1.

keyPrinciples: @anthropic-ai/sdk must remain imported ONLY in src/providers/anthropic.ts.
ESM .js import extensions; consistent-type-imports; prefer correct typed code over `any` (no-explicit-any is a warning, avoid it).
baselineNote: Before this sprint (SDK still 0.39.0): typecheck/lint/build PASS; `npm run test` has 2 PRE-EXISTING flaky timeout failures in the 'registers exactly 37 tools' tests (tests/mcp/external-server-graph.test.ts and/or src/mcp/tools/tools.test.ts). Those 2 are the ONLY tolerated failures; any other failure (especially in src/providers/) is a regression.
